register.brandSub: Discover where the profit is, where the waste is, and what to optimize first — with data and intelligent analysis.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start tracking your growth data in minutes.
register.termsNote: By creating an account, you agree to our terms of use.
register.successToast: Account created! Let's get everything set up.
register.loginAfterRegisterError: Account created, but error signing in. Try signing in manually.
register.genericError: Error creating account. Please try again.
register.emailRegisteredWithGoogle: This email is already registered with Google. Use the 'Continue with Google' button to sign in.
register.emailAlreadyExists: This email is already registered. Sign in to continue.
register.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

features.title: Real-time revenue
features.desc: Gross and net revenue, average ticket and margin by channel, all updated automatically.

features.title: Conversion funnel
features.desc: Visualize every step of the journey and identify exactly where customers are dropping off.

features.title: AI analysis
features.desc: Compare periods and receive automatic reports on profit optimization opportunities.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password

forgotPassword.notReceived: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.doneDesc: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.tokenError: Invalid token. Please request a new recovery link.
resetPassword.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.tokenUsed: This link has already been used. Request a new one.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: Link expired. Please request a new recovery link.
